purpose: HAR-324 delivery customization, promise, provider, and settings read/blocker evidence.

request.query: query DeliverySettingsOnly { deliverySettings { legacyModeProfiles legacyModeBlocked { blocked reasons } } deliveryPromiseSettings { deliveryDatesEnabled processingTime } }
query DeliveryCustomizationMissing($missingId: ID!) { deliveryCustomization(id: $missingId) { id title enabled functionId } }

errors.message: Access denied for deliveryCustomization field. Required access: `read_delivery_customizations` access scope.

request.query: query DeliveryCustomizationCatalog($first: Int!) { deliveryCustomizations(first: $first) { nodes { id title enabled functionId } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } }

errors.message: Access denied for deliveryCustomizations field. Required access: `read_delivery_customizations` access scope.

request.query: query DeliveryPromiseBranches($ownerIds: [ID!], $handle: String!, $locationId: ID!) { deliveryPromiseParticipants(ownerIds: $ownerIds, brandedPromiseHandle: $handle, first: 5) { nodes { id ownerType owner { __typename } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } deliveryPromiseProvider(locationId: $locationId) { id active fulfillmentDelay timeZone location { id name } } }

errors.message: Access denied for deliveryPromiseParticipants field. Required access: `read_delivery_promises` access scope.
Access denied for deliveryPromiseProvider field. Required access: `read_delivery_promises` access scope.

notes: The successful settings read is used only for the read-only snapshot branch.
Customization and promise blockers are not treated as empty successful reads.
Delivery customization mutations are Shopify Function-backed and remain unsupported until authorized success and validation captures exist.
Delivery promise and delivery setting mutations remain unsupported until access, eligibility, and downstream read-after-write behavior are captured.
